query:
SELECT 
  usl.recipientName,
  usl.recipientEmail,
  usl.digestType,
  usl.status,
  usl.errorMessage,
  usl.weekNumber,
  usl.sentAt
FROM userEmailSendLog usl
WHERE usl.digestType = 'thursday_reminder'
  AND usl.weekNumber = 20
ORDER BY usl.sentAt ASC;
